meaning: n.璧ら搧绉戝父闈掓爲鎴栧叾鏋滃疄
examples: The invention discloses a method for cultivating sapodilla dolls, which is a new plant variety.
Sapodilla is a kind of versatile tropical fruit tree and has great value in development and utilization.
Mayans chewed on the sap of the sapodilla tree and called it chicle.
